name: Intune Toolkit
description: A PowerShell-based GUI solution for managing Microsoft Intune policies. Features Microsoft Graph authentication, multi-platform policy and app management, assignment operations, backup/restore in JSON format, CSV/Markdown export, and comprehensive activity logging.
author: Maxime Guillemin

securityCheck.aiSummary: The Intune Toolkit script appears to be a legitimate endpoint-management tool integrating with Microsoft Graph and Intune. However, there are security concerns worth addressing: (1) data exposure risk from logging tenant and user details to a local log file, and (2) a potentially risky pattern of unblocking and loading many local scripts which could be exploited if the Scripts folder is compromised. No hardcoded secrets or obvious remote code execution are detected. Recommended mitigations include tightening log handling to avoid PIIs, signing and validating loaded scripts, and enforcing strict execution and source trust policies.
